name: login-craftsman-door-dusk
prompt: Warm intimate documentary photograph, blue-hour dusk turning to night. A welcoming craftsman cottage front door painted deep teal, the door itself completely plain with NO numbers and no hardware clutter, just a brass handle. A warm glowing wall-mounted lantern sconce is fixed to the clapboard wall to the RIGHT of the door at head height (mounted on the wall, NOT on the door, NOT above the door), casting a soft pool of amber light across the entry. A single small brass house-number plaque mounted on the wall beside the door shows one tidy two-digit number. A small potted fern and a worn welcome mat on the step, soft autumn leaves. Close, human-scale, the feeling of coming home. Cinematic warm color grade, honey and amber tones against cool blue dusk, shallow depth of field, 35mm film look, gentle grain, cozy and inviting, photojournalistic.
